name: the-tile
description: Maintain the-tile.com from Cowork — catalog edits, content updates, agent tuning, deploys, rollbacks. Backend wires to apps/web/app/api/admin/* in the same repo.
author: the-tile operator
noPurchaseRule: No purchase, transfer, paid sign-up, paid plan upgrade, or money movement is ever executed by this plugin without explicit per-action user confirmation. Pre-authorisations don't carry over.
